## What changed

Describe the user-visible mixed-direction behavior and the affected packages.

## Evidence

- [ ] Added or updated a focused regression test.
- [ ] Added or updated a corpus fixture when direction policy changed.
- [ ] Confirmed source text, selection, and copy order remain logical.
- [ ] Ran `pnpm run check`.
- [ ] Ran `pnpm run test:visual` for rendering or adapter changes.
- [ ] Ran package/release gates for manifest, dependency, or public API changes.
- [ ] Added a Changesets entry for a published-package API or behavior change.

## Security and language review

State whether the change handles untrusted text, bidi controls, or claims about
a language you do not read fluently. Link native-language or security review
when it exists; do not mark generated corpus volume as native certification.
